eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Coconino, AZ; at 12:30 PM on OCT 15, 2019 Effective until 10:30 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Silver Alert has been issued for Williams Police Department.  This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  Williams Police Department is looking for Arthur Cole, a 83 year old male, wearing pajama pants and a red sports jersey.  Arthur is driving a champagne colored 2006 Jeep Liberty with Arizona plate B M N 9 3 5 7. If you have contact with the Silver Alert, Please call 9 1 1.  Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
